member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Node
member.summary: Base class for all AST nodes in the advanced filter filter

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.And
member.summary: Logical AND operation between two nodes

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.And.#ctor(Ivy.Agent.Filter.Node,Ivy.Agent.Filter.Node)
member.summary: Logical AND operation between two nodes

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Or
member.summary: Logical OR operation between two nodes

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Or.#ctor(Ivy.Agent.Filter.Node,Ivy.Agent.Filter.Node)
member.summary: Logical OR operation between two nodes

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Not
member.summary: Logical NOT operation (negation) of a node

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Not.#ctor(Ivy.Agent.Filter.Node)
member.summary: Logical NOT operation (negation) of a node

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Op
member.summary: Normalized operator types for filter operations

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldType
member.summary: Column data types supported by the filter system

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldMeta
member.summary: Metadata about a column including display name, internal ID, and data type

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldMeta.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldType)
member.summary: Metadata about a column including display name, internal ID, and data type

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldMeta.#ctor(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Constructor for creating FieldMeta from a PropertyInfo

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf
member.summary: Leaf node representing a single filter condition on a column
member.param: The display name of the column as it appears in [brackets]
The internal column ID for the grid system
The data type of the column
First operand (or only operand for single-operand operations)

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldType,Ivy.Agent.Filter.Op,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Leaf node representing a single filter condition on a column
member.param: The display name of the column as it appears in [brackets]
The internal column ID for the grid system
The data type of the column
First operand (or only operand for single-operand operations)

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf.FieldDisplay
member.summary: The display name of the column as it appears in [brackets]

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf.FieldId
member.summary: The internal column ID for the grid system

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf.Type
member.summary: The data type of the column

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf.Op
member.summary: The normalized operator to apply

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf.A
member.summary: First operand (or only operand for single-operand operations)

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Leaf.B
member.summary: Second operand (reserved for future use)

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.DiagnosticSeverity
member.summary: Severity levels for filter diagnostics

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Diagnostic
member.summary: Represents a diagnostic issue found during filter parsing or validation
member.param: The severity level of the diagnostic
Line number where the issue occurs (1-based)
Column number where the issue occurs (0-based)
Length of the problematic text span

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Diagnostic.#ctor(Ivy.Agent.Filter.DiagnosticSeverity,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a diagnostic issue found during filter parsing or validation
member.param: The severity level of the diagnostic
Line number where the issue occurs (1-based)
Column number where the issue occurs (0-based)
Length of the problematic text span

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Diagnostic.Severity
member.summary: The severity level of the diagnostic

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Diagnostic.Message
member.summary: Human-readable description of the issue

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Diagnostic.Line
member.summary: Line number where the issue occurs (1-based)

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Diagnostic.Column
member.summary: Column number where the issue occurs (0-based)

member.name: P:Ivy.Agent.Filter.Diagnostic.Length
member.summary: Length of the problematic text span

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterErrorListener
member.summary: Custom error listener for ANTLR parser that collects syntax errors

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterErrorListener.AddSemanticError(System.String,Antlr4.Runtime.IToken)
member.summary: Adds a semantic error to the diagnostics collection

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterErrorListener.AddWarning(System.String,Antlr4.Runtime.IToken)
member.summary: Adds a warning to the diagnostics collection

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterErrorListener.Clear
member.summary: Clears all diagnostics

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterAstVisitor
member.summary: Visitor that builds an AST from the ANTLR parse tree and performs semantic validation

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterAstVisitor.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldMeta},Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterErrorListener)
member.summary: Visitor that builds an AST from the ANTLR parse tree and performs semantic validation

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterConverter
member.summary: Converts AST nodes to grid-compatible filter models

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterConverter.ConvertToModel(Ivy.Agent.Filter.Node)
member.summary: Converts an AST node to a grid filter model

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterModel
member.summary: Represents the filter model structure for grid filtering

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.GroupFilterModel
member.summary: Join filter model for combining multiple conditions with AND/OR

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldFilterModel
member.summary: Field filter model for leaf conditions

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldFilterModel.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Field filter model for leaf conditions

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterParseResult
member.summary: Result of parsing a filter, containing the AST and any diagnostics

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.UsageInfo
member.summary: Token usage information for cost tracking

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterParser
member.summary: Main entry point for parsing advanced filter filters

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterParser.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldMeta})
member.summary: Creates a new filter parser with the specified column metadata
member.param: Available columns mapped by their display names

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a filter string into an AST and filter model
member.returns: Parse result containing AST, model, and diagnostics

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterParser.IsValid(System.String)
member.summary: Quick validation method that returns true if the filter is syntactically and semantically valid

member.name: M:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FilterParser.GetAvailableFields
member.summary: Gets all available fields

member.name: T:Ivy.Agent.Filter.FieldMetaYaml
member.summary: YAML-serializable representation of field metadata

member.name: T:FiltersBaseListener
member.summary: This class provides an empty implementation of , which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

member.name: M:FiltersBaseListener.EnterFormula(FiltersParser.FormulaContext)
member.summary:
Enter a parse tree produced by .
The default implementation does nothing.

member.name: M:FiltersBaseListener.ExitFormula(FiltersParser.FormulaContext)
member.summary:
Exit a parse tree produced by .
The default implementation does nothing.

member.name: M:FiltersBaseListener.EnterExpr(FiltersParser.ExprContext)
member.summary:

The default implementation does nothing.

member.name: T:FiltersBaseVisitor`1
member.summary: This class provides an empty implementation of , which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
member.typeparam: The return type of the visit operation.

member.name: M:FiltersBaseVisitor`1.VisitFormula(FiltersParser.FormulaContext)
member.summary:
Visit a parse tree produced by .
The default implementation returns the result of calling on .

member.name: T:IFiltersListener
member.summary: This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by .

member.summary: Enter a parse tree produced by .

member.name: M:IFiltersListener.ExitFormula(FiltersParser.FormulaContext)
member.summary: Exit a parse tree produced by .
